module_info.docstring: Tests for stability detection via per-entry content hashing.

functions.name: test_first_run_creates_baseline
functions.docstring: First snapshot records entries but scores all as recent.

functions.name: test_stable_after_three_snapshots
functions.docstring: Entry unchanged across 3 snapshots scores stable.

functions.name: test_volatile_when_content_changes
functions.docstring: Changed content in the same section scores volatile.

functions.name: test_new_entry_scores_recent_when_section_has_no_prior_hashes
functions.docstring: New entry with count==1 and no prior hash in same section is recent.

functions.name: test_new_hash_in_existing_section_scores_volatile
functions.docstring: New hash with count==1 in section with prior different hash is volatile.

functions.name: test_removed_entry_not_in_scores
functions.docstring: Entries not in current scan are not scored.

functions.name: test_store_persists_across_instances
functions.docstring: Store data survives creating a new StabilityStore for the same file.
